status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched. This area is unusually unsettled: the Jan 2025 AI Diffusion Rule was rescinded before its compliance date and no consolidated replacement existed as of mid-2026 research. Treat as a placeholder citation pending a real policy landscape, not a stable regulation.
notes: See also registry/entity/gov/bis.json for the agency itself.

match_nodes.description: Export Administration Regulations — advanced computing / AI model weight export controls

data.official_name: Export Administration Regulations (EAR) — advanced computing and semiconductor manufacturing items controls
data.notes: Complicated, fast-moving area as of mid-2026. The 'Framework for Artificial Intelligence Diffusion' rule (Jan 15, 2025) revised EAR advanced-computing controls and added ECCN 4E091 (a worldwide license requirement for closed model weights of the most advanced dual-use AI models) but was RESCINDED by the following administration before its May 15 2025 compliance date, with no consolidated replacement rule as of this registration. Current posture is a patchwork: pre-existing EAR Entity List / ECCN 3A090 controls, non-regulatory guidance warning against supporting Chinese AI model training/inference, and a narrower Jan 2026 rule adjusting license-review policy for advanced-computing semiconductor exports to China/Macau. Cite the original Diffusion Rule as historical/superseded context; do not treat as the current rule.
